description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books bound together by a wide, dark brown leather strap. The upper book has a deep brown cover with subtle wear and a slightly textured finish, while the lower book is a lighter brown with visible aging along the edges. Decorative gold patterns adorn the spines, adding a touch of classic elegance. The pages are off-white and show some signs of use, with slight discoloration and unevenness at the edges. The strap is broad, wrapping vertically around both books and giving the bundle a secure, unified appearance. No visible illustrations or text are present on the covers, emphasizing a vintage, utilitarian style.
description: A pair of stacked, vintage hardcover books bound by a wide brown leather strap, featuring gold spine decorations and worn edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the page edges of both books and the leather strap running vertically down the center.
description_view_1: Spine view displaying ornate gold patterns on both book spines and the leather strap crossing horizontally.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible page edges and the strap running vertically.
description_view_3: Top view highlighting the plain brown cover of the upper book and the wide leather strap across the middle.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are decorated with gold geometric patterns and lines, with no visible text. The upper spine is dark brown, and the lower is a lighter brown, both showing signs of wear.
